caption: A large legislative chamber is filled with hundreds of people seated in tiered, semicircular rows of desks. The majority of the individuals are men wearing white traditional Indian attire, though some wear colorful orange or blue garments. Many people are seated and talking, while others lean forward or look toward the front of the room. In the foreground, several men in suits are seated at the lower desks. Throughout the sequence, there is very little movement; the crowd remains largely stationary, with minor shifts in posture and subtle head movements as they engage in conversation or listen. The room is characterized by light-colored walls and a structured, formal architectural layout. No on-screen text, logos, or specialized equipment are visible beyond the desks and seating arrangements.
